name: openDAW
description: openDAW is a next-generation web-based Digital Audio Workstation (DAW)
readme_summary: openDAW is a next-generation, open-source, web-based Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) focused on democratizing music production. It prioritizes user privacy with no sign-up, tracking, or ads, and aims to make high-quality music creation tools accessible for education and personal use.
key_features: Potential for PWA and native desktop app (Tauri)
primary_use_case: Accessible, privacy-focused, web-based music production and education.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, open-air music studio set up on a bustling, friendly town square, symbolizing accessibility and community. A diverse group of people of all ages are gathered around a central, glowing console that resembles a simplified, intuitive mixing desk. This console is projecting holographic musical notes and waveforms into the air, which are then being shaped and refined by the individuals using simple, gestural controls. Subtle UI elements of openDAW are visible on small, floating screens around the console, showing track timelines and audio effects. The overall mood is collaborative, creative, and empowering, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with bright, inviting colors and clear, friendly character designs.

name: Hunyuan3D-2-WinPortable
description: 📦Portable package for running Hunyuan3D 2.0/2.1 on Windows. | 混元 3D 2.0/2.1 整合包
readme_summary: This repository provides a portable package for running Hunyuan3D 2.0 and 2.1 on Windows. It integrates optimizations for consumer-grade GPUs and offers versions compatible with specific CUDA versions, simplifying the setup for 3D generation tasks.
key_features: Portable package for Hunyuan3D 2.0/2.1 on Windows
Optimized for consumer-grade GPUs (via mmgp integration)
Support for specific CUDA versions (12.9 and 12.6)
Reduced VRAM/RAM requirements through model offloading
Optional Developer Mode for efficient model storage
primary_use_case: To provide an easy-to-install and run portable application for generating 3D models and textures on Windows using the Hunyuan3D models, optimized for hardware with limited VRAM.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan in a cozy workshop, using a magical loom to weave intricate 3D models from raw digital threads. The artisan feeds colorful strands representing 'text' and 'images' into the loom, which then outputs detailed 3D shapes and vibrant textures. Subtle holographic screens around the workshop display the repository's name, 'Hunyuan3D Portable', and show simplified representations of the input and output models. The scene is bathed in warm, inviting light, rendered in a charming 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and wonder.

name: dwm-status-bar
description: DWM/xsetroot status bar: weather, USD/RUB, BTC, IMOEX (all sessions), Claude Code limits, net/RAM/CPU/battery
readme_summary: This repository provides a minimalist status bar for window managers like dwm and dwl. It aggregates various real-time information such as weather, currency exchange rates, stock market indices, API usage limits, network speed, system resource usage (RAM, CPU), battery status, and the current date/time into a single, concise string displayed on the root window.
key_features: Shows network upload/download speed using ifstat
Monitors Claude Code API usage limits
Retrieves Bitcoin price from Binance API
Displays USD/RUB exchange rate from the Central Bank of Russia
primary_use_case: To provide users of minimalist window managers with a consolidated, real-time information display on their root window, reducing the need for separate applications or widgets.
cover_image_prompt: A digital alchemist standing at a workbench, meticulously gathering glowing orbs of information from various sources: a weather icon, currency symbols, a stock chart, a network speed gauge, and a battery icon. The alchemist is carefully combining these orbs into a single, luminous thread that flows upwards and seamlessly integrates into the top edge of a minimalist computer screen displaying a clean status bar. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets float in the background. The scene is rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, modern aesthetic and a focus on the transformation of raw data into organized information. The repository name 'dwm-status-bar' is subtly etched on the workbench.

name: Vision-Agents
description: Open Vision Agents by Stream. Build voice and vision agents quickly with any model or video provider. Uses Stream's edge network for ultra-low latency.
readme_summary: Vision Agents is a Python library for building real-time, multi-modal AI agents that can process video, audio, and text. It leverages Stream's edge network for low-latency communication and integrates with various AI models (like OpenAI, Gemini, Claude) and computer vision tools (like YOLO, Roboflow).
key_features: Pluggable video processing pipeline (YOLO, Roboflow, custom models)
primary_use_case: Enabling developers to quickly build and deploy low-latency, intelligent video experiences that can watch, listen, and understand video content in real-time.
cover_image_prompt: A futuristic, transparent sphere hovering in a minimalist, tech-inspired room. Inside the sphere, a dynamic scene unfolds: a live video feed of a person speaking is being processed. Streams of data, represented by glowing lines, flow from the video feed to various AI icons (a brain for LLM, an eye for vision, an ear for STT). These icons then output synthesized information, visualized as clear, concise text bubbles and simple icons, appearing on a small, integrated screen on the sphere's surface. The repository name 'Vision Agents' is subtly etched onto the sphere. The overall mood is one of seamless, real-time intelligence and effortless integration. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a clean, vibrant color palette and soft, glowing effects.

name: InvoicePlane
description: A self-hosted open source application for managing your invoices, clients and payments.
readme_summary: InvoicePlane is a self-hosted, open-source web application for managing invoices, clients, and payments. It offers robust features for creating and tracking financial documents, with a recent update enhancing PHP compatibility and security.
key_features: Enhanced security (XSS, LFI, log poisoning fixes)
primary_use_case: Managing invoices, clients, and payments for businesses.
cover_image_prompt: A meticulous accountant character in a clean, modern office, using a magical ledger. The ledger displays incoming and outgoing financial data as glowing streams of light. The accountant is shown organizing these streams into neat, organized invoices and client records that float around them. Subtle UI elements resembling InvoicePlane's interface are visible on a nearby tablet. The overall mood is one of efficiency and control, with a bright, professional color palette. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration, emphasizing clarity and order.

name: pi-mono
description: AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods
readme_summary: The pi-mono repository provides a comprehensive toolkit for building AI agents, offering a unified LLM API, an agent runtime, a coding agent CLI, and libraries for TUI and web UIs. It aims to simplify the development and deployment of AI-powered applications and agents.
key_features: Unified multi-provider LLM API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.)
Agent runtime with tool calling and state management
Terminal UI library with differential rendering
Web components for AI chat interfaces
primary_use_case: Developing and deploying AI agents and AI-powered applications.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman in a bustling workshop, assembling intricate clockwork robots. The craftsman uses a universal blueprint (representing the unified LLM API) to guide the assembly of various robot parts (representing agent components). One robot, a 'coding assistant,' is shown writing code on a digital tablet, while another, a 'chat bot,' interacts with small, stylized speech bubbles. The workshop is filled with glowing tools and digital schematics, subtly hinting at AI and software development. The overall scene is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, organized composition and a warm, inviting color palette, with the 'pi-mono' name subtly integrated into a workshop sign.
